## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit (it becomes the squash commit message)
- [ ] Commits are signed
- [ ] `actionlint` is clean and any GitHub Actions are pinned by commit SHA
- [ ] No patched font output committed (`out/`, `dist/` stay gitignored)
- [ ] Version/tags left to release-please (not hand-edited)
